menu.emptyDescription: Click a season object in the 3D scene to see its cuisine details.

spring.label: Spring
spring.title: Spring Cuisine
spring.subtitle: Fresh herbs and bright seasonal aromas introduce the taste of spring.

bom_namul.title: Spring Namul
bom_namul.description: Fragrant greens such as wild chives, shepherd's purse, and shoots.

hwajeon.title: Hwajeon
hwajeon.description: A traditional flower pancake that captures the feeling of the season.

ssukguk.title: Mugwort Soup
ssukguk.description: A clear spring soup with the gentle aroma of mugwort.

strawberry_dessert.title: Strawberry Dessert
strawberry_dessert.description: A light dessert built around the freshness of spring fruit.

summer.label: Summer
summer.title: Summer Cuisine
summer.subtitle: Cold noodles and restorative dishes help carry the season's heat.

naengmyeon.title: Naengmyeon
naengmyeon.description: Cold broth and buckwheat noodles that cool down summer heat.

samgyetang.title: Samgyetang
samgyetang.description: A restorative chicken soup simmered with ginseng.

kongguksu.title: Kongguksu
kongguksu.description: Noodles served in a chilled, nutty soybean broth.

watermelon_hwachae.title: Watermelon Hwachae
watermelon_hwachae.description: A refreshing fruit punch enjoyed as a summer dessert.

autumn.label: Autumn
autumn.title: Autumn Cuisine
autumn.subtitle: Deep flavors and abundant harvest ingredients define autumn meals.

songpyeon.title: Songpyeon
songpyeon.description: A festive rice cake made with new grains and sweet fillings.

grilled_gizzard_shad.title: Grilled Gizzard Shad
grilled_gizzard_shad.description: A richly flavored seasonal fish especially enjoyed in autumn.

mushroom_jeongol.title: Mushroom Jeongol
mushroom_jeongol.description: A warm hot pot that highlights the aroma of seasonal mushrooms.

chestnut_rice.title: Chestnut Rice
chestnut_rice.description: Rice cooked with sweet chestnuts for an autumn table.

winter.label: Winter
winter.title: Winter Cuisine
winter.subtitle: Hot broths and beloved snacks bring warmth to the cold season.

seolleongtang.title: Seolleongtang
seolleongtang.description: A deep, mild ox bone soup slowly simmered for comfort.

tteokguk.title: Tteokguk
tteokguk.description: Rice cake soup traditionally enjoyed for the new year.

kimchi_jjigae.title: Kimchi Jjigae
kimchi_jjigae.description: A warm stew built from the rich flavor of aged kimchi.

hotteok.title: Hotteok
hotteok.description: A sweet filled winter street snack.
